zh.lifeSummary: 當Geoffroy IV de Thouars於大約1120年出生在法國努維勒-阿吉泰多武-瑟艾福雷斯瓦爾斯時，他的父親Aimery VI De Thouars26歲，母親Agnes of Aquitaine, wife of Ramiro II of Aragon, Queen consort of Aragon House of Poitiers21歲。他於1140年與Jeanne de Beaufort-Blavincourt在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯波奧福吉布拉維古特結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他於1139年被列為13ème vicomte de thouars de 1139 à 1151。他去世於1173年4月20日在法國布列塔尼享年54歲，埋葬在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易豐特福勞爾吉利阿巴易。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Geoffroy IV de Thouars于大约1120年出生在法国努維勒-阿吉泰多武-瑟艾福雷斯瓦爾斯时，他的父亲Aimery VI De Thouars26岁，母亲Agnes of Aquitaine, wife of Ramiro II of Aragon, Queen consort of Aragon House of Poitiers21岁。他于1140年与Jeanne de Beaufort-Blavincourt在法国豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯波奧福吉布拉維古特结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他于1139年被列为13ème vicomte de thouars de 1139 à 1151。他去世于1173年4月20日在法国布列塔尼享年54岁，埋葬在法国帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易豐特福勞爾吉利阿巴易。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Geoffroy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic (Frankish and Lombard) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It was in regular use among the counts of Anjou, ancestors of the English royal house of Plantagenet, who were descended from Geoffrey Plantagenet, Count of Anjou ( 1113–51 ). It was a particularly popular name in England and France in the later Middle Ages; notable bearers in England include the poet Geoffrey Chaucer ( c.1340–1400 ) and in Wales the chronicler Geoffrey of Monmouth ( d. 1155 ). The original form and meaning of the name is disputed. According to one theory, it is merely a variant of Godfrey ; others derive the first part from the Germanic word gawia ‘territory’, walah ‘stranger’, or gisil ‘pledge’. Medieval forms can be found to support all these theories, and it is possible that several names have fallen together, or that the name was subjected to reanalysis by folk etymology at an early date.

nameMeanings.name: IV
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Geoffroy IV de Thouars was born about 1120, in Thouars, Deux-Sèvres, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, his father, Aimery VI De Thouars, was 26 and his mother, Agnes of Aquitaine, wife of Ramiro II of Aragon, Queen consort of Aragon House of Poitiers, was 21. He married Jeanne de Beaufort-Blavincourt in 1140, in Beaufort-Blavincourt, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France. They were the parents of at least 1 son. In 1139, at the age of 20, his occupation is listed as 13ème vicomte de thouars de 1139 à 1151. He died on 20 April 1173, in Brittany, France, at the age of 54, and was buried in Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Geoffroy IV de Thouars est né environ 1120, à Thouars, Deux-Sèvres, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, son père, Aimery VI De Thouars, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Agnes of Aquitaine, wife of Ramiro II of Aragon, Queen consort of Aragon House of Poitiers, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Jeanne de Beaufort-Blavincourt en 1140, à Beaufort-Blavincourt, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. En 1139, à l’âge de 20 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est 13ème vicomte de thouars de 1139 à 1151. Il est décédé le 20 avril 1173, à Bretagne, France, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterré à Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Geoffroy IV de Thouars um 1120 in Thouars, Deux-Sèvres, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Aimery VI De Thouars 26 und seine Mutter Agnes of Aquitaine, wife of Ramiro II of Aragon, Queen consort of Aragon House of Poitiers 21. Er hat 1140 in Beaufort-Blavincourt, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich Jeanne de Beaufort-Blavincourt geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. 1139, als er 20 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als 13ème vicomte de thouars de 1139 à 1151 aufgeführt. Er starb am 20. April 1173 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Bretagne, Frankreich und wurde in Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Geoffroy IV de Thouars è nato il circa 1120 nel Thouars, Deux-Sèvres, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, il suo padre, Aimery VI De Thouars, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Agnes of Aquitaine, wife of Ramiro II of Aragon, Queen consort of Aragon House of Poitiers, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Jeanne de Beaufort-Blavincourt nel 1140, nel Beaufort-Blavincourt, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Nel 1139, all'età di 20 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come 13ème vicomte de thouars de 1139 à 1151. Morì il 20 aprile 1173, nel Bretagne, Francia, all'età di 54 anni, e fu sepolto a Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Geoffroy IV de Thouarsが約1120年にフランスノウベレ-アクイティアインデウクス-スevレスソウアルズで生まれた時，父Aimery VI De Thouarsは26歳，母Agnes of Aquitaine, wife of Ramiro II of Aragon, Queen consort of Aragon House of Poitiersは21歳であった。1140年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスビーウフォート-ブラヴィンコウルトでJeanne de Beaufort-Blavincourtと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。1139年，20歳の時，職業は13ème vicomte de thouars de 1139 à 1151と記録されている。彼は1173年4月20日にフランスブレタグンで54歳で死去し，フランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーメインエ-エト-ロイアーフォンテvラウルト-ル'アッバイにて埋葬された。

ko.Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, 49140, Maine-et-Lo: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 맹-트-로이르 폰테브라트-'압베이
ko.House of Thouars: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 맹-트-로이르 앤그르스 토우아르ce
ko.Chemillé,49092,Maine-et-Loire,Pays de la: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 맹-트-로이르 체미e
ko.lifeSummary: Geoffroy IV de Thouars(이)가 대략 1120년 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 데우스-스e브레스 토우아르스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Aimery VI De Thouars(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes of Aquitaine, wife of Ramiro II of Aragon, Queen consort of Aragon House of Poitiers(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1140년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 보포트-블래빈쿠르트에서 Jeanne de Beaufort-Blavincourt(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 1139년, 20세의 나이로 그의 직업은 13ème vicomte de thouars de 1139 à 1151이었다. 그는 1173년 4월 20일 프랑스 브레타그니에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 맹-트-로이르 폰테브라트-'압베이에 묻혔다.

pt.Chemillé,49092,Maine-et-Loire,Pays de la: Chemillé, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, França
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Geoffroy IV de Thouars nasceu aproximadamente 1120, em Thouars, Deux-Sèvres, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, França, seu pai, Aimery VI De Thouars, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Agnes of Aquitaine, wife of Ramiro II of Aragon, Queen consort of Aragon House of Poitiers, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Jeanne de Beaufort-Blavincourt em 1140, em Beaufort-Blavincourt, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Em 1139, com 20 anos, sua profissão aparece como 13ème vicomte de thouars de 1139 à 1151. Ele faleceu em 20 de abril de 1173, em Bretagne, França, com 54 anos, e foi sepultado em Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, França.

ru.Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, 49140, Maine-et-Lo: фонтевраулт-л'аббеи, меине-ет-лоир, пеис де ла лоир, Франция
ru.House of Thouars: тоуаркe, ангирс, меине-ет-лоир, пеис де ла лоир, Франция
ru.Chemillé,49092,Maine-et-Loire,Pays de la: чемиллe, меине-ет-лоир, пеис де ла лоир, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Geoffroy IV de Thouars родился около 1120 г. в местности тоуарс, деукс-сeвресь, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция, его отцу по имени Aimery VI De Thouars было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes of Aquitaine, wife of Ramiro II of Aragon, Queen consort of Aragon House of Poitiers, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Jeanne de Beaufort-Blavincourt в 1140 г. в местности бофорт-блавинкоурт, пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. В 1139 году, в возрасте 20 лет,  он работал по профессии 13ème vicomte de thouars de 1139 à 1151. Он умер 20 апреля 1173 г. в местности бретагн, Франция в возрасте 54 лет и был похоронен в местности фонтевраулт-л'аббеи, меине-ет-лоир, пеис де ла лоир, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Geoffroy IV de Thouars nació aproximadamente 1120, en Thouars, Deux-Sèvres, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, su papá, Aimery VI De Thouars, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Agnes of Aquitaine, wife of Ramiro II of Aragon, Queen consort of Aragon House of Poitiers, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Jeanne de Beaufort-Blavincourt en 1140, en Beaufort-Blavincourt, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. En 1139, a la edad de 20 años, su ocupación registrada era 13ème vicomte de thouars de 1139 à 1151. Murió el 20 de abril de 1173, en Bretagne, Francia, a la edad de 54 años, y fue sepultado en Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Francia.
